choose.otherwise: AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.sql: board_id , title , content , writer , view_cnt , notice_yn , delete_yn , created_date , modified_date
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM archive_board_info WHERE delete_yn = 0
